RevoGrid Community vendor assets
================================

Package: @revolist/revogrid
Version: 4.20.0
License: MIT

These files are copied from the package's `dist/revo-grid/` browser build so
the spreadsheet app can register the RevoGrid Web Component from same-origin
static assets without a frontend build step. The spreadsheet integration uses
only Community Web Component grid rendering/editing features. It does not use
RevoGrid Pro functionality, formula support, charting, cell merge, Excel export,
or any package outside this vendored Community build.
